entries.title: Anthropic’s latest feud with the Trump admin may actually help it, sales data suggests
entries.description: Anthropic's popularity with business users is growing so well that the latest beef with the government might actually boost it, data from Ramp suggests.

entries.title: SpaceX valuation balloons to $2.6T, briefly passes Amazon
entries.description: SpaceX's valuation has increased by $1 trillion since its shares started trading on Friday.

entries.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
entries.description: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that bri

entries.title: Sixty percent of US consumers say ‘AI’ in brand messaging is a turnoff, survey finds
entries.description: WordPress VIP’s latest survey suggests consumers are wary of AI-generated answers even as companies increasingly view AI search as an important referral channel.

entries.title: SpaceX is public: Everything you need to know post-IPO
entries.description: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and mayb

entries.title: DOJ claims xAI’s unpermitted gas turbines are a matter of ‘national, economic, and energy security’
entries.description: The Justice department says the Pentagon needs xAI to keep using its unpermitted gas turbines.

entries.title: Plaud says its software business topped $100M in ARR after shipping over 2M AI notetakers
entries.description: Plaud is trying to make a mark in a crowded market full of AI-powered meeting notetakers.

entries.title: Robinhood’s note on 10% layoffs shows blaming AI isn’t cutting it
entries.description: Unlike many of his tech industry peers who have cut thousands of jobs citing the need to restructure  to make the most of AI, Robinhood's CEO Vlad Tenev conspicuously made no mention of AI in his note

entries.title: Probably raises $9M to build a more reliable kind of AI
entries.description: Probably wants to prevent hallucinations and factual errors from reaching users, and achieve accuracy on par with deterministic systems.

entries.title: SpaceX to acquire Cursor for $60B in stock, days after blockbuster IPO
entries.description: The deal is supposed to help SpaceX's struggling AI division. The company told IPO investors it sees a $26 trillion addressable market in AI.

entries.title: ChatGPT’s market share slips below 50% for first time
entries.description: The chatbot still remains the most popular AI assistant worldwide with over 1.1 billion monthly users, followed by Gemini with 662 million and Claude with 245 million.

entries.title: Malaysia’s AI agent-powered messaging app Respond.io raises $62.5M, eyes acquisitions
entries.description: Respond.io, one of Malaysia's startups to watch, uses AI agents to handle high volumes of customer inquiries and charges per convo, not per seat.
